issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for AWS SES operations.

scenarios.name: verify-domain-dkim
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes the exact sesv2 commands required by the rubric, while Response B uses different SES commands and does not meet the rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: setup-receipt-rule-s3-lambda
scenarios.rationale: Response A exactly matches the required command and JSON structure, while Response B uses a different rule set name, rule name, bucket, and Lambda ARN, failing to meet the rubric.
